expert_note: Jaipur's expansion is a double-edged sword. JDA is grabbing 6,000 sq km, but the High Court is already breathing down their necks about the 679 villages. Don't buy 'future plans' unless you see the bitumen on the road. Tonk Road is a circus of speculation, while Ajmer Road is finally maturing due to the SEZ's industrial gravity.

listings.title: JDA Approved Plot - Shivdaspura Land Pooling Zone
listings.desc: Located in the heart of the first 164-hectare land pooling pilot project near Tonk Road.

ai_report.recommendation: BUY & FORGET. This is the only way JDA will develop now without getting stuck in land acquisition litigation. It's the 'New Jaipur' blueprint.
ai_report.infra: Part of the 336-hectare planned township; 200ft sector roads planned.
ai_report.catalysts: Proposed Satellite Hospital and Cargo Hub proximity.
ai_report.civilization: Currently zero. It's a dust bowl. Don't expect a grocery store for 3 years.
ai_report.utilities: JDA promised smart-grid electricity; water depends on Bisalpur Phase 2.

listings.title: Industrial Land - Mahindra SEZ DTA Zone
listings.desc: Domestic Tariff Area (DTA) plot suitable for MSME manufacturing near Wipro Hydraulics.

ai_report.recommendation: STRICTLY COMMERCIAL. The residential demand here is fake, but the industrial demand is real. Minimalist and Wipro are moving in.
ai_report.projections: Rental yields of 7% possible if built to spec.
ai_report.infra: Excellent internal SEZ roads; direct connectivity to Ring Road.
ai_report.catalysts: Mahindra Lifespaces targeting ₹500cr revenue in leasing; supply chain boom.
ai_report.civilization: Purely blue-collar. Not fit for 'luxury' residential living despite what brokers say.
ai_report.utilities: Dedicated industrial power lines; high-pressure water supply.

listings.title: Residential Plot - Ring Road Junction (Ajmer Rd)
listings.desc: Prime location near the newly completed cloverleaf connecting Ring Road to NH-48.

ai_report.recommendation: HOLD. Prices are peaked due to the cloverleaf opening. Wait for the 'infrastructure fatigue' to set in before negotiating.
ai_report.infra: Signal-free access to South Jaipur (20 mins) and Gurgaon (3 hours).
ai_report.catalysts: Completion of the Northern Ring Road will divert heavy trucks, making this 'livable'.
ai_report.civilization: Proximity to DPS and high-end schools, but air quality is poor due to NH-48 traffic.
ai_report.utilities: JDA water lines active; sewer lines still a pipe dream.

listings.title: Commercial Frontage - Tonk Road Ext (Chaksu Border)
listings.desc: Highway facing commercial plot near the proposed Northern Ring Road termination.

ai_report.recommendation: HIGH RISK. JDA's expansion to 679 villages is under High Court scrutiny. Ensure the conversion is 100% legal before touching this.
ai_report.projections: High volatility. Could double in 3 years or stay flat for 7.
ai_report.infra: NH-52 widening and Gati Shakti cargo terminal impact.
ai_report.civilization: Rural. You are buying the future, not the present.
ai_report.utilities: Borewell dependent. No government water for the next decade.

listings.title: Luxury Villa Plot - Sirsi Road Ext (Near Bagru)
listings.desc: Gated township plot located in the expansion zone between Sirsi and Bagru.

ai_report.recommendation: END-USER ONLY. If you want a weekend home, go for it. As an investment, it's too far from the employment hubs.
ai_report.infra: 200ft sector road proposed under Master Plan 2047.
ai_report.civilization: Emerging. Small townships popping up but zero public transport.
ai_report.utilities: Electricity okay; Sewerage via STP (Developer maintained).

localities.name: Shivdaspura
localities.utility_status: Heavy dependence on Land Pooling success; currently lack of basic JDA pipes.
localities.brutal_truth: The speculative engine of Jaipur. If the Land Pooling fails, this becomes the next legal nightmare. If it succeeds, it's the next Vidhyadhar Nagar.

localities.name: Mahindra SEZ (Zone)
localities.utility_status: Industrial grade utilities; world-class roads but no local lifestyle amenities.
localities.brutal_truth: The only area in Jaipur with actual 'jobs'. Don't buy residential plots; buy commercial or small-scale industrial plots nearby.

localities.name: Jagatpura
localities.utility_status: Overburdened drainage; traffic hell at 7-number stop; water scarcity in summers.
localities.brutal_truth: Overpriced and congested. The 'posh' tag is fading as high-rises create a concrete jungle without parking.

localities.name: Vatika
localities.utility_status: Groundwater levels dropping; JDA water not expected until 2027.
localities.brutal_truth: Secondary choice for those priced out of Sitapura. Good for long-term land banking, terrible for immediate living.

localities.name: Bagru
localities.utility_status: Industrial pollution in groundwater; solid road connectivity via NH-48.
localities.brutal_truth: Strictly an industrial play. Residential investment here is for people working in the printing units or factories only.

localities.name: Chaksu
localities.brutal_truth: The 'New Frontier' that is 20 years away from being a city. Only for investors who have zero need for liquidity.

localities.name: Phagi Road
localities.utility_status: Borewell dependent; erratic power; road widening in progress.
localities.brutal_truth: Better than Chaksu because of its proximity to the SEZ. Buy here if you want to bet on industrial sprawl.

localities.name: Sikar Road (Daulatpura)
localities.utility_status: NH-52 connectivity is great, but internal village roads are crumbling.
localities.brutal_truth: Heavy pollution and truck traffic. Until the Transport Nagar fully shifts, this remains a logistics hub, not a residential one.

infrastructure.name: Tonk Road - Ring Road Cloverleaf
infrastructure.desc: Fully functional load-tested interchange. Slashes travel time from Sitapura to Ajmer Road to 15 mins. Massive commercial push in a 2km radius.

infrastructure.name: Metro Phase 2 (Prahladpura Station)
infrastructure.desc: DMRC supervised project. Foundation stone expected mid-2025. Will connect Sitapura Industrial area to the main city.

infrastructure.name: Northern Ring Road (Bagru to Sikar Rd)
infrastructure.desc: Central Govt Vision 2047 project. Will complete the 360-degree loop around Jaipur. Land acquisition is 80% complete.

infrastructure.name: Sanganer Elevated Road
infrastructure.desc: ₹240 Cr project to bypass Sanganer Market congestion. Will boost property values in Vatika and Tonk Road Ext.

infrastructure.name: IPD Tower (SMS Hospital)
infrastructure.desc: India's tallest medical tower. Will cement Jaipur as a North India medical hub, driving nearby rental demand for patient attendants.

infrastructure.name: B2B Crossing Underpass
infrastructure.desc: Signal-free transit on JLN Marg/Tonk Road junction. Eased the bottleneck for commuters going towards the Airport.

infrastructure.name: Knowledge City South
infrastructure.desc: JDA's dedicated hub for universities and research centers. 1000+ acres earmarked but zero vertical growth yet.

infrastructure.name: Dravyavati River Elevated Corridor
infrastructure.desc: Proposed to ease traffic on Gopalpura Bypass. High environmental controversy, but strategically vital for East-West connectivity.

infrastructure.name: FinTech Park
infrastructure.desc: RIICO project to attract IT/Finance firms. Similar to GIFT City model but currently only attracting local builders.

infrastructure.name: 336-Hectare Land Pooling Site 1
infrastructure.desc: JDA's test case for the new land acquisition model. Success here determines the fate of all 679 newly added villages.
